notify.alertsText: Get pinged the second someone steals a crown near you.
notify.installText: Want crown-steal alerts? On iPhone, add Ombra to your home screen first.

google.google_setup: Google sign-in isn’t set up yet.
google.userinfo: Couldn’t read your Google profile. Try again.

checkin.needLocation: Turn on location. We need your real spot to check in.
checkin.too_far: You're too far. Get within 25m of the bar to check in.
checkin.cooldown: You already checked in here recently.
checkin.slow_down: Slow down. Wait {{wait}} min between check-ins.
checkin.poor_gps: Couldn't pin your location precisely. Try again in the open.
checkin.impossible_travel: That jump was too fast to be real.
checkin.terrace_not_found: This bar is not in the game yet.

signup.needGoogle: Sign in with Google to continue
signup.handleTaken: That name is taken. Try another

welcome.tagline: The shade-hunting game for Barcelona terraces.
welcome.sub: Find the shadiest terrace. Check in. Hold the crown until a friend comes to steal it.
welcome.footer: the sun is not your friend ☀

howItWorks.b1Sub: A live map rates every terrace by how shaded it is right now.
howItWorks.b2Sub: Pick your spot and see who currently holds its crown.
howItWorks.b3Sub: Within 25m? Check in and steal the throne on the spot.
howItWorks.b4Sub: Show up each week to defend your crown. Friends can take it.
howItWorks.legal: By continuing you agree to Ombra's <terms>Terms</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>

handle.typeToClaim: type a name to claim it

perms.body: We check you're actually at the terrace. No crowns from your couch. You must be within 25m to check in.

install.androidPrompt: Tap the button below. <hl>Ombra installs in a tap.</hl>
install.noStore: no app store · no download · it just shows up
install.getAlertsBody: We’ll ping you the second a friend steals your crown — but on iPhone, alerts only work once Ombra is on your home screen.
install.wrongBrowserBody: On iPhone, adding to your home screen — and getting crown alerts — only works in <hl>Safari</hl>. You’re in another browser right now.
install.copyHint: paste it in Safari, then add to home screen

terrace.ctaDenied: Turn on location to check in
terrace.ctaBlocked: Location is blocked. Tap to fix
terrace.blockedHelp: Ombra can't see your location. Turn it on in your phone or browser settings for this site, then reopen this terrace.
terrace.ctaPoor: Weak GPS. Step into the open

celebrate.guardBody: Get pinged the second a friend steals it, so you can race back.
celebrate.installBody: On iPhone, alerts only work once Ombra is on your home screen. Add it so we can ping you the second someone takes your crown.
celebrate.standing_one: @{{holder}} still rules {{terrace}} with {{count}} check-in this week. You're on {{mine}}, {{gap}} more to steal the crown.
celebrate.standing_other: @{{holder}} still rules {{terrace}} with {{count}} check-ins this week. You're on {{mine}}, {{gap}} more to steal the crown.
celebrate.someoneHolds: Someone else holds {{terrace}}'s crown. Keep checking in to steal it.

boards.title: LEADERBOARDS
boards.friendsSoonBody: Invite links and friend-only crown-stealing are next.
boards.noCheckins: No check-ins here yet. Be the first.

share.title: Ombra
share.text: I'm king of {{terrace}} 👑 Steal it if you can:

profile.startStreak: Check in at a terrace to start your streak.
profile.savePhotoError: Could not save photo. Try a smaller image.
profile.contactSub: Questions or feedback? Send us an email.
profile.firstCrownSub: Check in at a shady terrace to claim it.
